RoadSignsTools.UI[PanelSubtitle]: Route creation and saved route manager
RoadSignsTools.UI[ClosePanelTooltip]: Close the Road Signs Tools panel.
RoadSignsTools.UI[SavedRoutesTabTooltip]: Open saved routes and route-management actions.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ModeRenameTooltip]: Rename the currently selected road segments.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ModeAssignTooltip]: Assign a major route number to the current route selection.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ModeRemoveTooltip]: Remove the configured route designation from the selected segments.
RoadSignsTools.UI[PreviewFallback]: Base names preserved | Route code to apply: A12 |
RoadSignsTools.UI[UndoWaypointTooltip]: Remove the last committed waypoint from the current route.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ClearTooltip]: Clear the current route draft, including waypoints and input.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ApplyTooltip]: Apply the current route configuration to the selected route.
RoadSignsTools.UI[SavedRoutesIntro]: Choose a route to view details and actions.
RoadSignsTools.UI[FilterAllTooltip]: Show all saved routes without applying a prefix filter.
RoadSignsTools.UI[FilterPrefixMTooltip]: Show only saved routes that use the M prefix.
RoadSignsTools.UI[FilterPrefixATooltip]: Show only saved routes that use the A prefix.
RoadSignsTools.UI[FilterPrefixBTooltip]: Show only saved routes that use the B prefix.
RoadSignsTools.UI[FilterPrefixCTooltip]: Show only saved routes that use the C prefix.
RoadSignsTools.UI[NoSavedRoutes]: No saved routes yet. Apply a route to save it automatically.
RoadSignsTools.UI[NoSavedRoutesForFilter: No saved routes match this filter.
RoadSignsTools.UI[OpenSavedRouteTooltip]: Open this saved route. Double-click to preview it on the map.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ReviewFallback]: Review the proposed route path before committing changes.
RoadSignsTools.UI[PreviewSavedRouteToolt: Preview this saved route on the map without modifying it.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ReapplySavedRouteToolt: Apply this saved route configuration to the current world state again.
RoadSignsTools.UI[EditRoadsTooltip]: Load this saved route into road-name edit mode so you can correct its street naming without losing the saved route.
RoadSignsTools.UI[RebuildTooltip]: Recompute the saved route geometry from its stored waypoints.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ModifyTooltip]: Load this saved route into edit mode so you can correct the path before committing it.
RoadSignsTools.UI[SaveTitleTooltip]: Save the edited route title for this saved route.
RoadSignsTools.UI[SaveInputTooltip]: Save the edited route configuration input for this route.
RoadSignsTools.UI[CommitChangesTooltip]: Commit the edited route path using the safe revert-then-reapply pipeline.
RoadSignsTools.UI[AcceptRebuildTooltip]: Accept the rebuild candidate and apply it using the safe revert-then-reapply pipeline.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ModifyPathTooltip]: Load the rebuild candidate into the route editor so you can adjust the path before committing it.
RoadSignsTools.UI[CancelReviewTooltip]: Cancel this rebuild or modify review without changing the saved route.
RoadSignsTools.UI[DeleteSavedRouteToolti: Delete this saved route and revert its applied road changes.
RoadSignsTools.UI[BackToSavedRoutesToolt: Return to the full saved routes list.
RoadSignsTools.UI[ShowAllSavedRoutesTool: Return to the full list to view more saved routes.
RoadSignsTools.UI[PrefixDescriptionM]: Motorway / Highway - Carries the most traffic in your city. High-speed, limited-access roads.
RoadSignsTools.UI[PrefixDescriptionA]: A-Road - Major arterial road connecting districts and suburbs. High traffic volume.
RoadSignsTools.UI[PrefixDescriptionB]: B-Road - Secondary road serving as an alternative to A-roads. Moderate traffic volume.
RoadSignsTools.UI[PrefixDescriptionC]: C-Road - Minor road connecting smaller points of interest. Low to moderate traffic.
RoadSignsTools.UI[CustomPrefixTooltip]: Use a custom route prefix that you type yourself.
RoadSignsTools.UI[PositionBeforeTooltip]: Show the route number before the road name, for example M1 - Northern Hwy.
RoadSignsTools.UI[PositionAfterTooltip]: Show the route number after the road name, for example Northern Hwy - M1.
RoadSignsTools.UI[AutoRouteNumberTooltip: Pick the next available route number for the selected prefix.
